creator: g1.unless232@passinbox.com
text:
I also faced this issue after migrating from FreeBSD 13 to 14 (and once by simply rebooting) and I was able to recover the database by converting it from rockdb to sqlite (thanks to conduit_migrate from the conduit_toolbox project : https://github.com/ShadowJonathan/conduit_toolbox).

I also reported it in the bug filed by Max Chritian: https://gitlab.com/famedly/conduit/-/issues/475#note_2277464159
